train_name: Foundation Response Plan + Clarification Planner v0.3
intent_refinement_summary: additive refined_intent_type derived from structured signals (intent_type + concern_families + explain_signal + risk): safety_question, adverse_or_sensitivity_signal, greeting, comparison_question, skin_concern_explanation, product_recommendation_request, vague_product_request, clarify_concern_axis, cannot_determine. base intent_type unchanged.
concern_model_summary: central concern taxonomy; extraction lexicon (_FAMILY_FROM_CONDITION mapping existing conditions + _FAMILY_EXTRA_LEXICON for sun) SEPARATE from response content (_FAMILY_MODEL). 7 families. existing 'conditions' list unchanged (sun added only as family).
response_mode_summary: _response_mode(refined, decision, risk, families): safety_first, explain_first, compare_then_followup, ask_more_first, clarify_concern_axis, recommend_if_allowed, smalltalk_or_greeting. product decisions (recommend/do_not_recommend) take precedence over explain_first (hardening). does not relax recommendation permission.

no_heuristic_assertion.raw_keyword_to_answer_hardcoding: none (planner dispatches on normalized family key / refined_intent / response_mode)
no_heuristic_assertion.raw_keyword_to_clarification_hardcoding: none (clarification from family taxonomy clarify_axes, keyed by normalized family)
no_heuristic_assertion.alias_normalization_separated: extraction lexicons (_FAMILY_*_LEXICON, _EXPLAIN_SIGNAL) used only for extraction; content in _FAMILY_MODEL
no_heuristic_assertion.note: intent_type-based answer dispatch in judge() is the pre-existing v0.2 path and uses intent_type — a structured signal the task explicitly permits. Full routing of all answer text through the planner = Natural Answer Composer = FORBIDDEN this train (deferred).

여드름 피부에 대해서 알고 싶어.before: hold · '여드름/트러블 관련해서 조금 더 확인이 필요해요'
여드름 피부에 대해서 알고 싶어.after: explain_first · 설명(피지/모공/염증/장벽 + 좁쌀/염증/반복 타입) + 경로 질문 · 추천 0

피부가 요즘 자외선 때문에 고민이야.after: clarify_concern_axis · '자외선 때문이면 붉어짐·잡티·건조함' + '붉어짐/잡티/건조함/선케어 중 어디?' · 추천 0

세럼이 좋아 크림이 좋아?.after: compare_then_followup · 비교 설명 유지 + 목적 질문 · 추천 0

피부가 따끔거려.after: safety_first · do_not_buy/block 불변 · 추천 0 (over-block은 별도 JUDGE train)

뭘 알려줘?.after: ask_more_first generic — context payload 없이는 맥락 해결 불가(multi-turn 별도 train)

lens_safety_permission.note: all safety/permission invariants intact; high-risk block preserved; v0.3 only overrides plain/clar text; permissions correctly derived

lens_heuristic.resolution: skeptic flagged intent_type-based dispatch as heuristic; but intent_type is a task-sanctioned structured signal and concern-specific content IS family-key dispatched. requiring all answer text through the planner = full Natural Answer Composer = forbidden this train. No real violation; documented as deferred composer item.

lens_backward_compat.resolution: skeptic flagged that explain_signal+families could override answer for product-bearing decisions. FIXED: _response_mode now prioritizes recommend/do_not_recommend over explain_first, and the override is guarded by 'not products'. Verified: explain+family+candidates -> recommend_if_allowed (product-grounded answer preserved, NOT overridden); pure explain -> explain_first preserved. 40/40 + 16/16 still pass.

next_train_recommendation: Multi-turn Context Payload v0.3 (Cosmile sends history + Foundation accepts/uses)
JUDGE minor: 따끔 standalone block -> caution (safety-reviewed, separate approval)
